title: Research and plan isometric animated avatar pipeline

log.context: Research and plan isometric animated avatar pipeline

Now I have everything needed. Here is the full research findings and plan:

---

## Current State

**Existing avatar infrastructure is already well-established and working.** The pipeline is pure Python/Pillow — no external AI image APIs involved. All avatars are hand-crafted 64x64 pixel-art GIFs (6-12 frames, ~8fps) stored at `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/avatars/` and served as `/static/avatars/<name>.gif`.
